title: phegopteris dryopteris f. erecta
intro: Phegopteris dryopteris f. erecta, also known as the erect autumn fern, is a variety of the Phegopteris dryopteris species, a type of fern native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris dryopteris f. erecta include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
